economic_notes: Upper Nicola Band wholly owns Upper Nicola Holdings Limited Partnership. Has non-controlling interest in Stuwix Resources Joint Venture which paid $2,342,059 for contract services. Also holds interest in Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership and All Nations Trust Company. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-compliance with PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations - First Nation did not gather information to recognize/disclose potential asset retirement obligations. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Upper Nicola Holdings Limited Partnership (wholly owned), Stuwix Resources Joint Venture (non-controlling interest), and Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership. Adoption of PS 3450 Financial Instruments resulted in $2,624,820 adjustment to accumulated remeasurement gains. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($7,129,583) + ISC Recovery (-$20,358) + FNHA ($1,500,881) + FNESC ($468,373) + CMHC ($92,480) + Other Province of BC ($481,266) + ISC deferred from prior year ($2,468,267) + ISC deferred to future year (-$3,673,884) = approximately $10,044,455 after netting deferrals. OSR includes other income, forestry, BC Gaming, investment income, rental income, daycare fees, modified equity, and other deferred items. No schedule of remuneration was included in the extracted text.
